top_signals.title: Indonesia Ramps Up Currency Defense With Surprise Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s central bank on Tuesday announced a surprise interest rate hike, seeking to halt a currency freefall that risks stoking inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Investors warn Scotland to avoid long-term debt to limit independence premium
top_signals.summary: Fund managers say market will be ‘wary’ of long-dated bonds as nation plots first issuance since 17th century
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indonesia’s Bond Selloff Extends After Offcycle Rate Increase
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s bond market selloff deepened after the central bank delivered an offcycle interest-rate hike to protect the currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Public asked to help select UK wildlife to appear on new banknote series
top_signals.summary: The public are being asked to give their views on a selection of wildlife, native to the UK, that will appear on the next series of banknotes in a consultation launched today.

top_signals.title: GSK to buy cancer biotech Nuvalent for $10.6bn
top_signals.summary: Deal ranks as one of UK drugmaker’s biggest as biotech M&A activity accelerates this year

top_signals.title: GSK snaps up US cancer treatment firm Nuvalent in $10.6bn deal
top_signals.summary: Pharma giant GSK has sealed a $10bn deal to snap up Boston-based biopharmaceutical company Nuvalent. The FTSE 100 titan said it will pay $124 per share in cash in the agreement, marking a 40 per cent premium over what Nuvalent’s stock was trading at just before this announcement. The deal is expected to officially close [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
